title: Scabbard
description: A cross-loader compatibility library for various projects.
body:
Scabbard is a library mod used in cross multiloader development (Fabric, Forge & NeoForge) and is a required dependency for various projects such as Revelations of the Void, Solemngrounds & Slayer's Beasts. Features include:
- Registration utilities
- Biome modifications (Add Spawns/Features)
- Wood families
- Vanilla block compat
  - Flammables
  - Flattenables
  - Strippables
- Vanilla item compat
  - Compostables
  - Furnace fuels
  - Dispensibles
- Various data generation providers
- Built-in resource pack registration
- Custom block texture size
- Armor trim compatibility (WIP)

This mod is intended to streamline my personal mod development and more features may be added when my other projects would benefit from extra utilities.

For other developers who wish to use this, feel free to look through Slayer's Beasts as an example or contact me.
